issue.title: Inline plan editor in desktop app

successCriteria.description: Edit Plan button appears in IssueDetail.tsx when plan !== null and work status is NOT executing
Editor lets the user edit phase title, content (markdown), verification items (string array), files list, and addressesCriteria list
Phases are reorderable via @dnd-kit/sortable drag-and-drop; no new npm dependencies added
Phases can be added (empty template with auto-incremented number) and removed (with inline confirmation)
Success criteria can be edited: add/remove/modify id, category, and description fields
coverageMatrix is recomputed automatically on the frontend whenever phases or criteria change
A diff summary (before/after JSON in collapsible pre blocks) is shown before the save is confirmed
Save calls a new save_plan Tauri IPC that atomic-writes to .tiki/plans/issue-N.json; the detail panel reloads automatically via the existing file watcher

Lightweight client-side validation blocks save: no duplicate phase numbers, dependencies must reference existing phase numbers, no empty phase titles, all addressesCriteria values must reference known SC ids

phases.title: Rust save_plan IPC command
phases.content:
Add `save_plan` Tauri command in `apps/desktop/src-tauri/src/commands.rs` and register it in `lib.rs`.

The command accepts `(issue_number: u32, plan: serde_json::Value, tiki_path: Option<String>)` and atomic-writes to `.tiki/plans/issue-N.json`. Using `serde_json::Value` keeps the IPC simple — frontend sends camelCase JSON, command writes it as-is via `serde_json::to_string_pretty` + `fs_utils::atomic_write`. Validation and coverage recompute live in the frontend.

Use `resolve_tiki_path` (already in commands.rs) and `fs_utils::atomic_write` (already in fs_utils.rs). Create the plans directory if missing via `std::fs::create_dir_all`.

Register in `lib.rs` invoke_handler list after `commands::update_work_status`.
verification: cargo check in apps/desktop/src-tauri passes with no errors
save_plan accepts (issue_number: u32, plan: serde_json::Value, tiki_path: Option<String>)
save_plan is registered in tauri::generate_handler! in lib.rs
pnpm build from repo root passes

phases.title: PlanEditor.tsx skeleton with richer local types
verification: PlanEditor.tsx exists and exports EditorPlan/EditorPhase/EditorSuccessCriterion interfaces
IssueDetail.tsx local TikiPlan interface includes optional successCriteria and coverageMatrix
PlanEditor.css exists and is imported by PlanEditor.tsx
pnpm build from repo root passes with no TypeScript errors

phases.title: Full field editing: phases, success criteria, add/remove
phases.content:
Turn the read-only PlanEditor into an interactive form. All edits mutate `draft` via `setDraft` using immutable update patterns. Phase `status` remains a read-only badge (per OQ5).

### Phase fields

Each phase becomes an editable card with:
- **Title**: text input
- **Content**: textarea (rows={6})
- **Verification**: string array editor (rows of `<input>` + Remove button + `+ Add` at end)
- **Files**: same string array editor pattern
- **addressesCriteria**: render each known SC.id as a checkbox; toggling adds/removes from `phase.addressesCriteria`
- **Dependencies**: number array editor (parse `Number(value)` on change)
- **Phase number**: read-only display

Use the immutable update pattern: `setDraft(d => ({ ...d, phases: d.phases.map((p, i) => i === idx ? { ...p, field: newValue } : p) }))`.

### Add Phase

Button at bottom of phase list: `{ number: max(phases.number) + 1, title: '', status: 'pending', content: '', verification: [], files: [], addressesCriteria: [], dependencies: [] }` appended to draft.phases.

### Remove Phase (inline confirm)

Local state `confirmRemovePhase: number | null`. Remove button sets it to phase.number; while set, render "Remove this phase? Confirm / Cancel" inline. Confirm filters draft.phases. **Do NOT auto-renumber remaining phases** — that breaks `dependencies` references.

### Success criteria editing

In the SC list section: each row has editable id (small width), category (medium), description (wide). Per-row Remove with inline confirm. `+ Add Criterion` button appends `{ id: 'SC' + (draft.successCriteria.length + 1), category: '', description: '' }`.

### CSS additions to PlanEditor.css

.plan-editor-phase-card, .plan-editor-phase-header, .plan-editor-phase-number, .plan-editor-status-badge, .plan-editor-input, .plan-editor-textarea, .plan-editor-array-row, .plan-editor-add-btn, .plan-editor-remove-btn, .plan-editor-confirm-remove, .plan-editor-field-label, .plan-editor-sc-row (with id/cat/desc input variants), .plan-editor-criteria-checkbox-row.
verification: Each phase card has editable inputs for title, content, verification, files, addressesCriteria, dependencies
Phase status renders as a read-only badge with no input
Add Phase button appends a new phase with auto-incremented number
Remove phase shows inline confirmation before mutating draft
SC section supports editing id/category/description per row, add new SC, and remove with confirmation
pnpm build from repo root passes

Dragging a phase reorders draft.phases via arrayMove
No new entries in apps/desktop/package.json

phases.title: Coverage matrix recompute and structural validation
verification: recomputeCoverageMatrix returns Record<string, number[]> keyed by SC ids
validateDraft catches: empty title, duplicate phase number, dep referencing missing phase, addressesCriteria referencing missing SC
Errors display inline next to offending fields and as a top banner

phases.title: Diff view, save flow, and Edit Plan trigger button
verification: Edit Plan button visible in IssueDetail when plan !== null && work?.status !== 'executing'
Clicking Edit Plan shows the editor inline; clicking Close hides it
Review Changes button is disabled when errors.length > 0
Diff view shows before/after JSON in two collapsible <details><pre> blocks
Save Plan calls invoke('save_plan', { issueNumber, plan: { ...draft, coverageMatrix }, tikiPath })
After successful save, onClose() runs and the file watcher reloads the plan
Save errors surface inline; isSaving disables the button
pnpm build from repo root passes
